rationale: Gov't Code §2001.037 governs which text controls when rule versions conflict; it does not address homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: If a conflict exists, the official text of a rule is the text on file with the secretary of state and not the text published in the Texas Register or on file with the issuing state agency.
_note: No conflict; cited rule is procedural regarding official rule text, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
